steps.title: Translate costs into mathematical expressions
steps.content: The cereal costs a fixed \$2. Strawberries cost \$1.90 per pound, so p pounds cost \$1.90p. The total paid is \$9.60.

steps.title: Build the total cost equation
steps.content:
The total cost is the sum of the cereal and strawberries:

$$2 + 1.90p = 9.60$$

Rearranging: $1.90p + 2 = 9.60$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
